customManagers.description: Track the @anthropic-ai/claude-code version pinned in the CI npm install (no package.json in this Go repo, so the github-actions manager can't see it).

Track the bd (gastownhall/beads) release pinned as BD_VERSION in the integration job so version rot / CVEs surface as Renovate PRs. BD_SHA256 is intentionally not auto-bumped (hosted Renovate cannot recompute a tarball hash); the sha256sum -c check in the same step fails closed until the hash is recomputed for the new version.

Track the jj (jj-vcs/jj) release pinned as JJ_VERSION in the integration job so version rot / CVEs surface as Renovate PRs. JJ_SHA256 is intentionally not auto-bumped (hosted Renovate cannot recompute a tarball hash); the sha256sum -c check in the same step fails closed until the hash is recomputed for the new version.
